programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 16
programs.desc: Mike Brewer and mechanic Ant Anstead struggle to restore damaged vehicles.They want to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.When the car goes to the workshop, Edd restores its shine.

programs.title: But the ride
programs.desc: Artists, athletes and TVN Turbo journalists comment on shocking, funny and strange materials recorded by drivers with amateur cameras.

programs.title: Road absurdities
programs.desc:
In the next season of the program, Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysztof Ruszała will face construction negligence, lack of imagination, and sometimes simple stupidity, which still abounds on Polish roads.They will take a closer look at modern highways, city streets, but also local roads.In addition to pointing out irregularities, they will work with experts to look for ways to solve problems.There will be interventions in offices, construction contractors and road managers.The leaders will be wherever things go wrong and Polish drivers, cyclists, pedestrians and motorcyclists suffer.The program is based on reports from viewers who report road absurdities in various parts of the country
Kamil and Krzysztof go to the Ozorków bypass to check why trucks cannot use it.Then they will visit the town of Izabela, whose inhabitants can't wait for an asphalt road, and try to find out why, according to the signs on the national S8, Wrocław is changing its location by several kilometers.Absurdity hunters will also show a strange place in Łódź where vehicles are allowed to park on the sidewalk, with little space left for pedestrians.The presenters also reflect on the poorly profiled Konotopa junction on the Warsaw bypass.Finally, they will reach Sieradz to admire the forest... of lanterns.
